creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
left a piece of my heart at the most iconic cathedral in #barcelona #spain ✨🕍🧡💛🇪🇸✨ 

📍designed by Antoni Gaudí, this basilica showcases a unique blend of Gothic and Art Nouveau styles, with intricate details and organic forms that mimic nature & after building for 140 years it’s schedule to complete next year 

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#sagradafamilia #visitbarcelona #gaudiarchitecture #dotzsoh
